signals.headline: Fed Chair Powell Describes 'Very Unusual' Economy with Tariff-Driven Goods Inflation Peaking Q1 2026, Amid Rate Cut and
signals.raw:
Fed Chair Powell Describes 'Very Unusual' Economy with Tariff-Driven Goods Inflation Peaking Q1 2026, Amid Rate Cut and Labor Market Warnings | YES | HIGH**  
Powell announced on Wednesday that the U.S. economy faces tariff-induced goods inflation, expected to peak around Q1 2026 assuming no new tariffs, while inflation excluding tariff-affected goods is in the low 2% range.[1]  
He framed the lat
matched_markets: Will Powell say "Tariff inflation" during April press conference?

Elon Musk April Tweet Count Markets Trending on Polymarket | NO | LOW confidence**

Polymarket's most active markets right now focus on **Elon Musk's tweet volumes**, such as "Elon Musk # tweets April 17 - April 24, 2026?" (29% on 180-199 range) and "Elon Musk musk # tweets in April 2026?" (28% on 1120-1159, 18% on 1080-1119), with over $19.1M in trading volume across 20+ active Tweet Markets[2][3
